FR-01.title: League and Season Creation
requirements: Implement complete league and season creation functionality

league and season creation data persists correctly across sessions

FR-01.title: Build League and Season Creation API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for league and season creation feature in Sports League Management. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build League and Season Creation UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for league and season creation. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Design League and Season Creation Database Schema
FR-01.description: Create database tables/collections for league and season creation. Define fields, data types, constraints, indexes, and relationships. Add migration scripts.
